# Chatterify

> Chatterify is a top-rated web development and AI agency based in Kolkata, India, building custom websites, AI chatbots, voice agents, and mobile apps for clients worldwide. Two-week sprints. Pricing starts at ₹5,000.

## About

Chatterify (chatterify.in) delivers modern digital solutions for businesses, startups, and individuals globally. The team specializes in full-stack web development with React, Next.js, and Node.js; AI chatbot integration with GPT and other LLMs; conversational voice agents using ElevenLabs and Twilio; and cross-platform mobile apps with React Native and Flutter.

- Founded: 2024
- Headquarters: Kolkata, West Bengal, India
- Service area: Worldwide (India, US, UK, Canada, Australia, UAE, Singapore, Germany, and more)
- Email: chatterifyservice@gmail.com
- Languages: English, Hindi, Bengali

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://www.chatterify.in/): Overview of services, team, and approach
- [Services & Pricing](https://www.chatterify.in/services): Full price list for web, chatbot, voice, video
- [About](https://www.chatterify.in/about): Team, mission, and origin
- [Contact](https://www.chatterify.in/contact): Free quote form, email, working hours
- [Blog](https://www.chatterify.in/blog): Articles on web development, AI, and digital strategy
- [Templates](https://www.chatterify.in/templates): Production-ready website templates

## Services

- [Web Development](https://www.chatterify.in/services/web-development): Custom websites and web applications. Landing page (₹5K–₹12K), business website (₹12K–₹30K), e-commerce (₹25K–₹80K), custom web app (₹30K–₹1.2L+). Stack: React, Next.js, Node.js, TypeScript, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, AWS, Vercel.
- [AI Chatbot Integration](https://www.chatterify.in/services/chatbot-integration): GPT-powered chatbots for websites, WhatsApp, Slack. Basic chatbot (₹5K–₹12K), AI chatbot with automation (₹12K–₹30K), advanced LLM/RAG chatbot (₹30K–₹70K).
- [AI Voice Agents](https://www.chatterify.in/services/voice-agents): Inbound and outbound voice automation. Basic voice bot (₹10K–₹25K), AI voice call agent (₹25K–₹60K), advanced automation (₹60K–₹1.5L). Built with ElevenLabs and Twilio.
- [Mobile App Development](https://www.chatterify.in/services/app-development): Cross-platform iOS and Android apps using React Native and Flutter, plus native Swift and Kotlin for performance-critical builds.
- [Video Editing](https://www.chatterify.in/services/video-editing): Reels (₹300–₹800), YouTube videos (₹1K–₹3K), professional content (₹3K–₹8K), business promos (₹5K–₹20K).

## Startup Packages

- Starter (₹10,000): Landing page + basic chatbot + 2 reels
- Business (₹25,000): Business website + chatbot integration + 5 edited videos
- Premium (₹60,000+): Custom web app + AI chatbot + voice agent + ongoing video editing

## Why Chatterify

- Senior engineers — no juniors handed your project
- Two-week delivery sprints with weekly demos
- Transparent fixed-price packages, no hidden fees
- Ongoing retainer support: uptime, features, AI retraining
- Multi-currency: INR, USD, EUR, GBP via bank transfer, UPI, card, PayPal, Stripe
